channel.title: Ghost of Radio — Classic Old Time Radio
channel.description: Free classic old time radio streaming. 14,000+ episodes from the golden age of radio — The Shadow, Sam Spade, Dragnet, Suspense, Lone Ranger and 50+ more shows.
channel.itunes:author: Ghost of Radio
